# ClawBeat

> ClawBeat.co is the intelligence feed for the OpenClaw agentic AI framework ecosystem. It curates news articles, research papers, GitHub projects, events, and daily briefings covering OpenClaw and alternative agentic frameworks (NanoClaw, etc.).

ClawBeat is updated continuously via automated scrapers and a daily AI-generated briefing published each day at 5pm PST. All data is stored in Supabase and accessible via a public read-only API.

## Site Pages

- [Intel Feed](https://clawbeat.co/): Latest news and research articles about OpenClaw and the agentic AI ecosystem
- [Events Calendar](https://clawbeat.co/events-calendar.html): Upcoming OpenClaw conferences, meetups, and virtual events
- [Forge](https://clawbeat.co/forge.html): Tracked GitHub projects and repositories in the OpenClaw ecosystem
- [Daily Edition](https://clawbeat.co/daily/): AI-generated daily briefings summarizing the top OpenClaw stories

## OpenClaw Skill

ClawBeat is available as an installable OpenClaw skill on ClawHub. Agents can query news, events, repos, research papers, and daily briefings directly — no credentials required.

- [ClawBeat on ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/thekenyeung/clawbeat): Install with `clawhub install clawbeat`

## Data

ClawBeat's live data is queryable via the Supabase REST API using a public read-only key. Available datasets:

- `news_items` — curated news articles with title, url, summary, pub_date, tags
- `events` — OpenClaw events with title, date, type (virtual/in-person), location
- `github_projects` — tracked repos with name, description, stars, language, topics
- `research_papers` — papers with title, authors, pub_date, abstract
- `daily_editions` — daily briefing stories with headline, summary, analysis, and why-it-matters

## About

ClawBeat is an independent publication. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the OpenClaw project or its maintainers.
